events.title: The Western Roman Empire falls
Clovis converts to Christianity, unifying the Franks
St. Augustine brings Christianity to England
The Battle of Tours halts Muslim expansion into Europe
Charlemagne is crowned Holy Roman Emperor
The Treaty of Verdun divides Charlemagne's empire
Alfred the Great becomes king of Wessex
The Great Schism splits Christianity
The Norman Conquest of England
Pope Urban II calls the First Crusade
Crusaders capture Jerusalem
Thomas Becket is murdered
Saladin recaptures Jerusalem
King John signs the Magna Carta
Marco Polo begins his journey to Asia
The fall of Acre ends the Crusader states
The Great Famine strikes Europe
The Hundred Years' War begins
The Black Death arrives in Europe
The Peasants' Revolt in England
The Battle of Agincourt
Joan of Arc leads France at the Siege of Orleans
Constantinople falls to the Ottomans
The Hundred Years' War ends
The Reconquista ends with the fall of Granada
